items.title: Iran after Khamenei: What's next and what it means for the country?
items.description: Khamenei assumed power following the death of Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini in 1989, inheriting a revolutionary state still consolidating itself.

items.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is dead, state news media confirms
